title: oxydectes joufra
side_effects: Oxydectes joufra can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Ingesting large amounts of the plant's leaves or roots can lead to stomach pain, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, improper use of oxydectes joufra can also cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and itching, in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can even lead to more severe health issues, including liver damage and respiratory problems.
